Fields.Name: [Idle] Energy Recovery Rate
Fields.Description: Change the energy recovery rate by energy recovery speed x energy recovery rate x 0.01

Fields.Name: [Idle] Energy Max
Fields.Description: Specify the maximum energy percentage

Fields.Name: [Idle] Energy Min
Fields.Description: Specify the lower limit percentage of energy. If -1, use the system-prepared energy debt value.

Fields.Name: [Idle] Apply Energy Recovery Delay
Fields.Description: If enabled, energy recovery delay is applied.
